format.raw: itime=$EPOCH date=$DATE time=$TIME logid=1220000020 type=event subtype=unknown pri=alert user=system ui=system action=rating status=success reason=none letype=6 msg=$ATTACK_NAME jobid=$CONN_ID sha1=$SHA1 sha256=$SHA256 rating=$RATING scantime=$SCAN_TIME malwarename=$ATTACK_NAME srcip=$SRC_IP dstip=$DST_IP protocol=HTTP url=$URL

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="Key&Value" arr_length="-1">
    <Field position="0" name="date" />
    <Field position="1" name="msg" />
    <Field position="2" name="reason" />
    <Field position="3" name="src_ip" org_name="srcip" />
    <Field position="4" name="sha256" />
    <Field position="5" name="rating" />
    <Field position="6" name="itime" />
    <Field position="7" name="type" />
    <Field position="8" name="jobid" />
    <Field position="9" name="prtc" org_name="protocol" />
    <Field position="10" name="ui" />
    <Field position="11" name="subtype" />
    <Field position="12" name="action" />
    <Field position="13" name="dstn_ip" org_name="dstip" />
    <Field position="14" name="letype" />
    <Field position="15" name="pri" />
    <Field position="16" name="malware_name" org_name="malwarename" />
    <Field position="17" name="url" />
    <Field position="18" name="sha1" />
    <Field position="19" name="scan_time" org_name="scantime" />
    <Field position="20" name="logid" />
    <Field position="21" name="time" />
    <Field position="22" name="user" />
    <Field position="23" name="device" />
    <Field position="24" name="status" />
    <Field position="25" name="vendor" convert_tag="[[@set('fortinet')]]" />
    <Field position="26" name="model" convert_tag="[[@set('sandbox')]]" />
    <Field position="27" name="logtype" convert_tag="[[@set('security')]]" />
    <Field position="28" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v1')]]" />
    <Field position="29" name="original_log" convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="30" name="parser_info" convert_tag="[[@set('[Fortinet]_sandbox_security_v1_keyvalue')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
